input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.10.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.10.1
            TITLE: if a vehicle stalls and cannot restart without external assistance, or is damaged and not able to

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.10.1: If a vehicle stalls and cannot restart without external assistance, or is damaged and not able to
D.3.10.1 If a vehicle stalls and cannot restart without external assistance, or is damaged and not able to 
complete the run, it will be scored DNF for that run

final_answer: rule D.3.10.1: If a vehicle stalls and cannot restart without external assistance, or is damaged and not able to complete the run, it will be scored DNF for that run
